summary: Workspace contract and artifact mapping are correctly implemented with deterministic structure, explicit artifact definitions, and proper integration into pipeline execution. Implementation satisfies acceptance criteria and adheres to orchestration constraints.
reasons: Workspace layout is explicitly defined via RELATIVE_STAGES and enforced by ensureWorkspaceLayout, creating isolated deterministic directories for all stages.
Artifact mapping is fully explicit through RELATIVE_ARTIFACTS and resolveWorkspacePaths, eliminating any implicit path inference.
video_path is correctly materialized as a canonical reference artifact (video_reference) and consistently propagated via pipeline context and stage environment variables.
contracts.json is deterministically generated using buildContractsDocument with sorted keys and stableStringify, ensuring reproducible output.
ARTIFACT_HANDOFFS clearly define stage-to-stage artifact flow, satisfying strict contract mapping requirements.
runPipeline integrates ensureWorkspaceLayout and writeContractsFile before stage execution, guaranteeing workspace and contracts are materialized upfront.
pipeline-context correctly aliases inputVideoRef to video_reference, preserving backward compatibility while enforcing canonical artifact usage.
Tests validate workspace layout, artifact path determinism, contracts.json generation, and CLI integration, covering acceptance criteria.
No artifact inference, mutation, or cross-scope access is present; all paths are resolved deterministically under output_dir.
Implementation remains within orchestration scope and does not introduce processing logic belonging to subprojects.
